meaning: n.感觉性,感觉能力,感觉,知觉
examples: Some people believe in the sentience of flowers.
A key issue is sentience, or the ability to feel pleasure and pain. For.
I recognize the sentience of the mice outside, and also the sentience of the fox.
Mr. Kushino reconstructs Victorian lace-ups with skins of lamb, goat, ostrich and stingray, as well as jet crystals, lace and lacquered branches, to create shoes of mythological depth and sentience.
